languages.text: {n}Лария удивленно вскидывает бровь.{/n} "Благодарите Бога-Императора, что он послал вам меня. Немногие сенешали стали бы вслушиваться в ваши слова в надежде вытащить оттуда хоть крупицу истины".

traits.locale_text: {n}Лария удивленно вскидывает бровь.{/n} "Благодарите Бога-Императора, что он послал вам меня. Немногие сенешали стали бы вслушиваться в ваши слова в надежде вытащить оттуда хоть крупицу истины".

languages.text: {n}Laria arches an eyebrow in surprise.{/n} "You should thank the God-Emperor for sending you my way. Few Seneschals would have listened to your words with the hope of extracting even a grain of truth from them."
languages.original_text: {n}Лария удивленно вскидывает бровь.{/n} "Благодарите Бога-Императора, что он послал вам меня. Немногие сенешали стали бы вслушиваться в ваши слова в надежде вытащить оттуда хоть крупицу истины".

traits.locale_text: {n}Laria arches an eyebrow in surprise.{/n} "You should thank the God-Emperor for sending you my way. Few seneschals would have listened to your words with the hope of extracting even a grain of truth from them."

{n}Laria arches an eyebrow in surprise.{/n} "You should thank the God-Emperor for sending you my way. Few seneschals would have listened to your words with the hope of extracting even a grain of truth from them."

{n}Laria arches an eyebrow in surprise.{/n} "You should thank the God-Emperor for sending you my way. Few seneschals would have listened to your words with the hope of extracting even a grain of truth from them."

languages.text: {n}菈丽雅惊讶地挑起一侧眉毛。{/n}“你该感谢神皇让你碰上了我。换作别的总领，恐怕连听都懒得听，更别说指望从中找出一丁点儿实情了。”
languages.original_text: {n}Laria arches an eyebrow in surprise.{/n} "You should thank the God-Emperor for sending you my way. Few Seneschals would have listened to your words with the hope of extracting even a grain of truth from them."

traits.locale_text: {n}菈丽雅惊讶地挑起一侧眉毛。{/n}“你该感谢神皇让你碰上了我。换作别的总领，恐怕连听都懒得听，更别说指望从中找出一丁点儿实情了。”

languages.text: {n}Surprise, Laria hausse un sourcil.{/n} « Vous devriez remercier l'Empereur-Dieu d'avoir croisé mon chemin. Rares sont les sénéchaux qui auraient prêté l'oreille à de tels propos dans le fol espoir d'y dénicher ne serait-ce qu'une once de vérité. »
languages.original_text: {n}Laria arches an eyebrow in surprise.{/n} "You should thank the God-Emperor for sending you my way. Few Seneschals would have listened to your words with the hope of extracting even a grain of truth from them."

traits.locale_text: {n}Surprise, Laria hausse un sourcil.{/n} « Vous devriez remercier l'Empereur-Dieu d'avoir croisé mon chemin. Rares sont les sénéchaux qui auraient prêté l'oreille à de tels propos dans le fol espoir d'y dénicher ne serait-ce qu'une once de vérité. »

languages.text: {n}Laria, şaşkınlıkla tek kaşını kaldırıyor.{/n} "Sizi kaşıma çıkardığı için Tanrı İmparator'a şükretmelisiniz. Sözlerinizden zerre kayda değer bir şey çıkması umuduyla dinlemeye tenezzül edecek Seneşal bulamazsınız."
languages.original_text: {n}Laria arches an eyebrow in surprise.{/n} "You should thank the God-Emperor for sending you my way. Few Seneschals would have listened to your words with the hope of extracting even a grain of truth from them."

traits.locale_text: {n}Laria, şaşkınlıkla tek kaşını kaldırıyor.{/n} "Sizi kaşıma çıkardığı için Tanrı İmparator'a şükretmelisiniz. Sözlerinizden zerre kayda değer bir şey çıkması umuduyla dinlemeye tenezzül edecek Seneşal bulamazsınız."

languages.text: {n}Laria arquea una ceja, sorprendida.{/n} «Debería darle las gracias al Dios Emperador por haberl{mf|e|a} llevado hasta a mí. Pocos senescales habrían escuchado esas palabras con la esperanza de extraer aunque fuera una milésima de verdad de ellas».
languages.original_text: {n}Laria arches an eyebrow in surprise.{/n} "You should thank the God-Emperor for sending you my way. Few Seneschals would have listened to your words with the hope of extracting even a grain of truth from them."

traits.locale_text: {n}Laria arquea una ceja, sorprendida.{/n} «Debería darle las gracias al Dios Emperador por haberl{mf|e|a} llevado hasta a mí. Pocos senescales habrían escuchado esas palabras con la esperanza de extraer aunque fuera una milésima de verdad de ellas».

languages.text: {n}Laria hebt überrascht ihre Braue.{/n} "Ihr solltet dem Gottimperator danken, dass er Euch zu mir geschickt hat. Nur wenige Truchsesse hätten Euch in der Hoffnung zugehört, auch nur ein Körnchen Wahrheit in ihnen zu finden."
languages.original_text: {n}Laria arches an eyebrow in surprise.{/n} "You should thank the God-Emperor for sending you my way. Few Seneschals would have listened to your words with the hope of extracting even a grain of truth from them."

traits.locale_text: {n}Laria hebt überrascht ihre Braue.{/n} "Ihr solltet dem Gottimperator danken, dass er Euch zu mir geschickt hat. Nur wenige Truchsesse hätten Euch in der Hoffnung zugehört, auch nur ein Körnchen Wahrheit in ihnen zu finden."

languages.text: {n}ラリアは眉を上げて驚いた様子を見せた。{/n}「神帝に感謝すべきだ。私を導いてくれたのだ。真実の一粒も見いだそうと、あなたの言葉を聞いたって、ほとんどの執事にはいなかっただろう。」
languages.original_text: {n}Laria arches an eyebrow in surprise.{/n} "You should thank the God-Emperor for sending you my way. Few Seneschals would have listened to your words with the hope of extracting even a grain of truth from them."

traits.locale_text: {n}ラリアは眉を上げて驚いた様子を見せた。{/n}「神帝に感謝すべきだ。私を導いてくれたのだ。真実の一粒も見いだそうと、あなたの言葉を聞いたって、ほとんどの執事にはいなかっただろう。」
